image_prompts.cover: Top-down minimalist flat-lay: a small white piggy bank in the center, several Korean coins (500won, 100won) scattered around it, a blank desk calendar showing the number 5 highlighted, on a warm beige fabric background. Soft morning window light. Symbolizing a 5-year savings journey. Editorial magazine style, clean composition, no text visible.
image_prompts.section-1: A side-angle macro shot: stacks of Korean 500won coins arranged in a growing column from short to tall (like a bar chart, 5 stacks), each stack slightly taller than the previous, on a clean wooden desk. Soft natural daylight. Symbolizing 5-year compound growth. Minimalist editorial style.
image_prompts.section-2: Top-down editorial shot: an open notebook with a simple geometric checklist (5 empty checkboxes drawn as physical small wooden tokens), beside a calculator and a few Korean banknotes (10000won) fanned out. Soft beige background, refined and analytical mood. Suggesting eligibility checklist.

scenes.text: 월급쟁이 청년이면 무조건 봐야 하는 정부 적금이 있어요. 청년도약계좌, 5년 묶어두면 최대 5천만원이에요.
핵심 혜택은요? 정부가 매월 최대 4만원 매칭에 이자 비과세까지!
단, 5년 못 채우면 혜택이 다 회수되니까, 비상금은 파킹통장에 따로 두세요.
